rules.name: no-hardcoded-colors
rules.evidence: Tailwind only, semantic tokens (`bg-muted`, `text-foreground-light`), no hardcoded colors.

rules.name: use-shortcut-registry
rules.evidence: when adding or changing repeated Studio UI actions, use the shared shortcut registry and primitives

uncompilable: Toolchain/version requirement: pnpm 10 + Turborepo, Node >= 22 (environment fact, not an action).
Directory structure table describing purposes of apps/studio, apps/docs, apps/www, packages/ui, packages/common, e2e/studio (pure documentation, no obligation attached).
Common Commands code block listing pnpm scripts (usage catalog only, no must/never/before/after attached to any entry).
Import shared UI from 'ui' and use _Shadcn_-suffixed variants for form primitives (general import/naming style, no precise action-bindable trigger).
Use U.S. English everywhere (general language style guidance, not tied to a specific tool call).
Studio uses Pages router; co-locate sub-components with parent (general file-organization convention, no specific actionable trigger).
Keep 'G then ...' chords for navigation (stylistic detail of the shortcut convention, not independently action-bindable).
